Blue Harbor Coffee Roasters is a small specialty coffee company based in Portland that buys ethically sourced beans from cooperatives in Colombia and Ethiopia and roasts them in small weekly batches.
The company operates a subscription program with three tiers called Starter, Explorer, and Reserve, where higher tiers include limited seasonal microlots and early access to new roast profiles.
Customer support policy states that damaged deliveries are replaced within forty-eight hours, while subscription pauses can be requested once per month through the account portal without extra fees.

The operations team tracks quality metrics including roast consistency, shipping delay rate, and refund ratio, and leadership reviews these metrics every Friday to adjust supplier and logistics decisions.
